string: A developer tool launched from Dez requested administrator privileges.
Dez or a developer tool you launched wants to automate another app with Apple events.
A developer tool you launched from Dez wants to connect to a Bluetooth device.
A developer tool you launched from Dez requested access to your calendars.
A developer tool you launched from Dez requested access to the camera.
A developer tool you launched from Dez requested access to your contacts.
A developer tool you launched from Dez requested location access in the background.
A developer tool you launched from Dez requested access to your location.
A developer tool you launched from Dez requested location access while it is active.
A developer tool you launched from Dez requested access to the microphone.
A developer tool you launched from Dez requested access to speech recognition.
A developer tool you launched from Dez requested access to your reminders.
